title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices used in Cardiovascular System - Agenda - June 26, 2015 - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices used in Cardiovascular System - Agenda - June 26, 2015
- Place: Holland Cross, Tower B, Room 2048
- Date and time: June 26, 2015, 7:30 am to 16:00 pm
- Chairperson: Dr. John Ducas
- Science Advisor: Hripsime Shahbazian
- Participants: SAC-MDUCS Members, Guest Speakers & Health Canada
- Scientific & Regulatory Officers: Caroline Hunt
- Director Generals Office: Cindy Evans
- Members: Eric Cohen, John Ducas, Marino Labinaz, Alan Menkis, Joaquim Miró, Tofy Mussivand, Barry Rubin, John Webb (teleconference), Raymond Yee
- Guest Speakers: Sébastien Bergeron, Sanjit Jolly, Vivek Rao
- Medical Devices Bureau: Kevin Day, James McGarrity, Maurice Sylvain, Mark Korchinski, Ian Glasgow, Jianming Hao, Ian Aldous, Lanyi Xu, Catherine Milley, Karen Kennedy, Bisi Lawuyi
- Regrets: Christopher Feindel, Brent Mitchell, Renzo Cecere
